name: Apple sauce
description: It's some apple sauce. It doesn't really care what happens, it doesn't care if you drop, throw, freeze, sit on it, or be freaky with it. But It will not tolerate trying to be eaten. It WILL turn into a demonic slop of apple sauce and it probably will eat you if you try to eat it. Also you have a mouse infestation. Every day another apple sauce appears can you solve this mystery?
creator: Lolbit8484
